Title: Test Person class with valid data
Test Data:
- name: John Doe
- age: 30
- gender: Male
Test Steps:
1. Create a new instance of the Person class.
2. Set the name, age, and gender attributes using the setter methods.
3. Verify that the name, age, and gender attributes have been set correctly using the getter methods.
Expected Result: The name, age, and gender attributes are set correctly.

Test Steps:

2. Set the name, age, and gender attributes using the setter methods.
3. Verify that the name, age, and gender attributes have not been set correctly using the getter methods.
Expected Result: The name, age, and gender attributes are not set correctly due to invalid input.
